recommendations.title: Pusher II
recommendations.overview: Tonny is released from prison - again. This time he has his mind set on changing his broken down life, but that is easier said than done.

recommendations.title: Pusher
recommendations.overview: A drug pusher grows increasingly desperate after a botched deal leaves him with a large debt to a ruthless drug lord.

recommendations.title: Bronson
recommendations.overview: A young man who was sentenced to 7 years in prison for robbing a post office ends up spending 30 years in solitary confinement. During this time, his own personality is supplanted by his alter ego, Charles Bronson.

recommendations.title: The Neon Demon
recommendations.overview: When aspiring model Jesse moves to Los Angeles, her youth and vitality are devoured by a group of beauty-obsessed women who will take any means necessary to get what she has.

recommendations.title: Fear X
recommendations.overview: When his wife is killed in a seemingly random incident, Harry, prompted by mysterious visions, journeys to discover the true circumstances surrounding her murder.

recommendations.title: Bleeder
recommendations.overview: Two stories for the price of one: a video store clerk tries to get acquainted with a waitress; a man beats his pregnant wife, unaware that her brother is a violent racist.

recommendations.title: Pusher III
recommendations.overview: Milo is aging, he is planning his daughter's 25th birthday, and his shipment of heroin turns out to be 10,000 pills of ecstasy. When Milo tries to sell the pills anyway, all Hell breaks loose and his only chance is to ask for help from his ex-henchma

recommendations.title: Only God Forgives
recommendations.overview: Julian, who runs a Thai boxing club as a front organization for his family's drug smuggling operation, is forced by his mother Crystal to find and kill the individual responsible for his brother's recent death.

recommendations.title: Drive
recommendations.overview: Driver is a skilled Hollywood stuntman who moonlights as a getaway driver for criminals. Though he projects an icy exterior, lately he's been warming up to a pretty neighbor named Irene and her young son, Benicio. When Irene's husband gets out of jai

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.
